<Minimap:move>
The door is locked and won't open. You need to activate the
levers in each separate building on the left and right.
<Minimap:move>
Final battle. It seems that if I defeat the principal here,
I will be able to save Mai. At least, that's what the
principal says... but.
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"Well... Shall we prepare various things before Kosakai arrives?"
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"Because there will be a suitable welcome for the final battle."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"Hmm... Should I go all out or greet them with a cool vibe...
It's really vexing."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"Well, my greatness remains unchanged in any situation, but
it's only natural to want to show it off a little bit."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"Small Sakai might fall for me, captivated by my overwhelming
coolness... It's possible... Muahahaha."
The principal is eagerly indulging in light delusions as they head
towards the final battle. In the end, they won't know how they will be
received until the time comes. And regardless of what happens, it has
nothing to do with Rio.
Her goal is to take down the principal and help Mai!

小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"There's no way that's true. I just contacted you to tell you
one thing I had forgotten to convey."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"There are entrances on the left and right sides of the mansion, you
know? Those are separate annexes of this mansion, but you can't enter
the main building without activating the lever inside there."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"There's no talent in storming the main building suddenly...
Besides, in order to activate the lever, you need to defeat
a formidable enemy, but that's just part of the agreement."
小田巻-三郎（スーツ）_表情一覧
Principal
"So, please do your best to conquer the mansion. Muhohohoho."
